erasmus.title: Erasmus+

general_info.title: What is Erasmus+?
general_info.description: The Erasmus+ programme is one of BME's most popular international opportunities, allowing you to try yourself abroad – either in the form of a study semester or an internship. A new country, new culture, and plenty of experiences await, while you don't have to interrupt your studies at home. Erasmus+ is not just a scholarship, but a lifelong adventure that improves your language skills, gives you independence, and helps you build international connections – both professionally and personally.

erasmus.current_call: Current call for applications for long-term study mobility
